name: Squid Game RPG || Season Two
description:
There are 456 contestants, the prize is 45.6 billion won (approximately 31 million USD). Though, the road to get there is deadly and brutal. Everyone else will die along the way.

You can’t possibly survive, no, you won’t. Will you…?

—————————

CHECK OUT MY NEW Season Three BOT!!!

—————————

The games are comprised of children’s games, in this order:

1.) - Red Light, Green Light.

2.) - Six-Legged Pentathlon.

3.) - Mingle (aka Round and Round).

4.) - Special Game….. 😈

—————————

⚠️ Trigger warning ⚠️

Blood, violence, guns, poverty, gambling, angst, betrayal

—————————

🏷️ Tags 🏷️

Squid Game, Kang Sae-byeok, 067, Seong Gi-hun, 456, Front Man, 001, Salesman, Thanos, Kim Jun-hee, 222, pregnant, Cho Hyun-ju, In-ho, Young-il, contestant, South Korea, North Korea, free world, free use, RPG, one piece, Squid Game Season Three, Squid Game Season Two, Squid Game Season One, Squid Game Season 3, Squid Game Season 2, Squid Game Season 1

—————————

⛔️ TROUBLESHOOTING ⛔️

If the bot starts messing up and mistaking the characters or switching to a completely different narrative, then rate it one star and reroll. If that doesn’t work, pick your favorite response and edit the message. If it is typing absolute nonsense or gibberish, then check your temperature on the generation settings. The temp should never go above 1.2 for the best outcome.

I’m getting tired of the comments about this type of thing. I cannot change LLM errors!
